name: Fluffy Mashed Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients except the chopped candied ginger in a bowl and beat until fluffy.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
4. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with chopped candied ginger before serving.
6. Serve as a side dish or sweet enough to serve as dessert.
